1→(* Pure game logic for collision / damage.
     2→   D1 only -- no ox_math dependency needed. *)
     3→
     4→(* Object flags matching main_d1/object.h *)
     5→let of_exploding = 1
     6→let of_destroyed = 4
     7→
     8→(* -- Algebraic effects for side effects -------------------------------- *)
     9→
    10→(* D1 effects *)
    11→type _ Effect.t +=
    12→  | Increment_kills : unit Effect.t
    13→  | Start_boss_death : int -> unit Effect.t
    14→  | Explode_object : int -> unit Effect.t
    15→  | Send_net_robot_explode : (int * int) -> unit Effect.t
    16→  | Query_multi_explode : (int * int) -> bool Effect.t
    17→

    22→  | Query_multi_all_players_alive : bool Effect.t
    23→  | Do_final_boss_hacks : unit Effect.t

    25→  | Save_stolen_items : unit Effect.t
    26→  | Restore_stolen_items : unit Effect.t
    27→  | Clear_stolen_items : unit Effect.t
    28→  | Query_multi_explode_d2 : (int * int * bool) -> bool Effect.t
    29→  | Multi_send_robot_explode_d2 : (int * int * bool) -> unit Effect.t
    30→  | Start_robot_death_sequence : int -> unit Effect.t
    31→  | Special_reactor_stuff : unit Effect.t
    32→  | Explode_object_delay : (int * int) -> unit Effect.t
    33→
    34→(* -- Pure decision logic ----------------------------------------------- *)
    35→
    36→let apply_damage_to_robot_d1
    37→      ~flags
    38→      ~shields
    39→      ~damage
    40→      ~is_boss
    41→      ~is_multiplayer
    42→      ~obj_id
    43→      ~killer_objnum
    44→  =
    45→  (* Robot already exploding? *)
    46→  if flags land of_exploding <> 0
    47→  then shields, false, 0 (* Robot already dead? *)
    48→  else if shields < 0
    49→  then shields, false, 0
    50→  else (
    51→    let set_boss_been_hit = is_boss in
    52→    let new_shields = shields - damage in
    53→    if new_shields < 0
    54→    then
    55→      (* Robot killed *)
    56→      if is_multiplayer
    57→      then
    58→        if Effect.perform (Query_multi_explode (obj_id, killer_objnum))
    59→        then (
    60→          Effect.perform (Send_net_robot_explode (obj_id, killer_objnum));
    61→          new_shields, set_boss_been_hit, 1)
    62→        else new_shields, set_boss_been_hit, 0
    63→      else (
    64→        Effect.perform Increment_kills;
    65→        if is_boss
    66→        then Effect.perform (Start_boss_death obj_id)
    67→        else Effect.perform (Explode_object obj_id);
    68→        new_shields, set_boss_been_hit, 1)
    69→    else new_shields, set_boss_been_hit, 0)
    70→;;
    71→
    72→(* ── get_explosion_vclip ────────────────────────────────── *)
    73→
    74→let obj_robot = 2
    75→let obj_player = 4
    76→let vclip_small_explosion = 2
    77→
    78→(* Pure function: extracts vclip_num from pre-extracted scalar args.
    79→   obj_type, stage, exp1_vclip_num, exp2_vclip_num, expl_vclip_num *)
    80→let get_explosion_vclip ~obj_type ~stage ~exp1_vclip_num ~exp2_vclip_num ~expl_vclip_num =
    81→  if obj_type = obj_robot
    82→  then
    83→    if stage = 0 && exp1_vclip_num > -1
    84→    then exp1_vclip_num
    85→    else if stage = 1 && exp2_vclip_num > -1
    86→    then exp2_vclip_num
    87→    else vclip_small_explosion
    88→  else if obj_type = obj_player && expl_vclip_num > -1
    89→  then expl_vclip_num
    90→  else vclip_small_explosion
    91→;;
    92→
    93→(* ── apply_damage_to_clutter (shared D1/D2) ────────────── *)
    94→
    95→let apply_damage_to_clutter ~flags ~shields ~damage ~obj_id =
    96→  if flags land of_exploding <> 0
    97→  then shields, 0
    98→  else if shields < 0
    99→  then shields, 0
   100→  else (
   101→    let new_shields = shields - damage in
   102→    if new_shields < 0
   103→    then (
   104→      Effect.perform (Explode_object_delay (obj_id, 0));
   105→      new_shields, 1)
   106→    else new_shields, 0)
   107→;;
   108→
   109→(* ── apply_damage_to_controlcen (shared D1/D2) ─────────── *)
   110→
   111→(* Control center effects *)
   112→type _ Effect.t +=
   113→  | Show_hud_invul_message : unit Effect.t
   114→  | Controlcen_been_hit : unit Effect.t
   115→  | Do_controlcen_destroyed : int -> unit Effect.t
   116→  | Add_controlcen_score : unit Effect.t
   117→  | Multi_send_destroy_controlcen : (int * int) -> unit Effect.t
   118→  | Sound_controlcen_destroyed : int -> unit Effect.t
   119→
   120→let apply_damage_to_controlcen
   121→      ~shields
   122→      ~flags
   123→      ~damage
   124→      ~who_is_player
   125→      ~who_is_local_player
   126→      ~who_objnum
   127→      ~local_player_objnum
   128→      ~is_multiplayer
   129→      ~is_coop
   130→      ~time_level_ok
   131→      ~obj_id
   132→      ~who_id
   133→  =
   134→  (* Only allow a player to damage the control center *)
   135→  if not who_is_player
   136→  then shields
   137→  else if
   138→    (* Network invulnerability timer *)
   139→    is_multiplayer && (not is_coop) && not time_level_ok
   140→  then (
   141→    if who_is_local_player then Effect.perform Show_hud_invul_message;
   142→    shields)
   143→  else (
   144→    if who_is_local_player then Effect.perform Controlcen_been_hit;
   145→    let new_shields = if shields >= 0 then shields - damage else shields in
   146→    if new_shields < 0 && flags land (of_exploding lor of_destroyed) = 0
   147→    then (
   148→      Effect.perform (Do_controlcen_destroyed obj_id);
   149→      if is_multiplayer
   150→      then (
   151→        if who_objnum = local_player_objnum then Effect.perform Add_controlcen_score;
   152→        Effect.perform (Multi_send_destroy_controlcen (obj_id, who_id)));
   153→      if not is_multiplayer then Effect.perform Add_controlcen_score;
   154→      Effect.perform (Sound_controlcen_destroyed obj_id);
   155→      Effect.perform (Explode_object_delay (obj_id, 0)));
   156→    new_shields)
   157→;;
   158→
   159→(* ── apply_damage_to_player ──────────────────────────── *)
   160→
   161→(* Player damage effects *)
   162→type _ Effect.t +=
   163→  | Palette_flash : (int * int * int) -> unit Effect.t
   164→  | Set_player_dead : int -> unit Effect.t
   165→  | Set_buddy_sorry_time : unit Effect.t
   166→  | Apply_damage_to_player : (int * int * int) -> unit Effect.t
   167→      (* player_objnum, killer_objnum, damage — calls C's apply_damage_to_player *)
   168→
   169→(* f2i: shift right by 16 (matching fix-point conversion) *)
   170→let f2i x = x asr 16
   171→
   172→let apply_damage_to_player_d1
   173→      ~is_dead
   174→      ~is_invulnerable
   175→      ~is_endlevel
   176→      ~is_local_player
   177→      ~player_shields
   178→      ~damage
   179→      ~killer_objnum
   180→  =
   181→  if is_dead
   182→  then player_shields, false
   183→  else if is_invulnerable
   184→  then player_shields, false
   185→  else if is_endlevel
   186→  then player_shields, false
   187→  else if not is_local_player
   188→  then player_shields, false
   189→  else (
   190→    (* D1: dead-code invulnerable branch exists in original but is unreachable
   191→       due to early return above. We skip it and go straight to damage. *)
   192→    let new_shields = player_shields - damage in
   193→    Effect.perform (Palette_flash (f2i damage * 4, -f2i (damage / 2), -f2i (damage / 2)));
   194→    if new_shields < 0
   195→    then (
   196→      Effect.perform (Set_player_dead killer_objnum);
   197→      new_shields, true)
   198→    else new_shields, false)
   199→;;
   200→
   201→let apply_damage_to_player_d2
   202→      ~is_dead
   203→      ~is_invulnerable
   204→      ~is_endlevel
   205→      ~is_local_player
   206→      ~player_shields
   207→      ~damage
   208→      ~killer_objnum
   209→      ~killer_is_companion
   210→  =
   211→  if is_dead
   212→  then player_shields, false
   213→  else if is_invulnerable
   214→  then player_shields, false
   215→  else if is_endlevel
   216→  then player_shields, false
   217→  else if not is_local_player
   218→  then player_shields, false
   219→  else (
   220→    let new_shields = player_shields - damage in
   221→    Effect.perform (Palette_flash (f2i damage * 4, -f2i (damage / 2), -f2i (damage / 2)));
   222→    if new_shields < 0
   223→    then (
   224→      Effect.perform (Set_player_dead killer_objnum);
   225→      if killer_is_companion then Effect.perform Set_buddy_sorry_time;
   226→      new_shields, true)
   227→    else new_shields, false)
   228→;;
   229→
   230→(* ── maybe_kill_weapon ────────────────────────────────── *)
   231→
   232→let proximity_id = 16
   233→let superprox_id = 38
   234→let pmine_id = 51
   235→let pf_persistent = 0x20
   236→let obj_weapon = 5
   237→
   238→(* Shared inner logic: weaken non-persistent weapon or kill it *)
   239→let maybe_kill_weapon_inner ~phys_flags ~weapon_shields ~other_type ~other_shields =
   240→  if phys_flags land pf_persistent <> 0 || other_type = obj_weapon
   241→  then
   242→    (* Persistent weapons survive; non-persistent get weakened *)
   243→    if phys_flags land pf_persistent <> 0
   244→    then weapon_shields, false
   245→    else (
   246→      let dmg =
   247→        if other_type = obj_weapon then other_shields / 2 else other_shields / 4
   248→      in
   249→      let s = weapon_shields - dmg in
   250→      if s <= 0 then 0, true else s, false)

1→(* Pure game logic for control center frame AI.
     2→   do_controlcen_frame: detects player, selects gun, fires lasers with spread. *)
     3→
     4→let f1_0 = 0x10000
     5→let ndl = 5
     6→
     7→(* -- Algebraic effects for side effects -------------------------------- *)
     8→
     9→type _ Effect.t +=
    10→  | Fire_weapon : (int * int * int * int * int * int * int * int) -> unit Effect.t
    11→  | Send_controlcen_fire : (int * int * int * int * int) -> unit Effect.t
    12→  | P_Rand : int Effect.t
    13→
    14→(* Fire_weapon args: dir_x, dir_y, dir_z, pos_x, pos_y, pos_z, parent_id, make_sound *)
    15→(* Send_controlcen_fire args: dir_x, dir_y, dir_z, gun_num, obj_id *)
    16→(* P_Rand returns: int *)
    17→
    18→let make_random_vector () =
    19→  let rx = (Effect.perform P_Rand - 16384) lor 1 in
    20→  let ry = Effect.perform P_Rand - 16384 in
    21→  let rz = Effect.perform P_Rand - 16384 in
    22→  let _, v = Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(rx, ry, rz) in
    23→  v
    24→
    25→(* FVI external for inline visibility check — reuses physics sim C function *)
    26→external fvi_find_vector_intersection : int array -> int array
    27→  = "cd_ox_effect_ps_find_vector_intersection"
    28→
    29→(* Inline visibility check using FVI ray cast.
    30→   Returns 2 if player visible (hit nothing or hit the player object), 0 otherwise. *)
    31→let check_player_visible ~obj_x ~obj_y ~obj_z ~obj_segnum ~console_x ~console_y
    32→    ~console_z ~obj_id ~player_objnum =
    33→  let query = [| obj_x; obj_y; obj_z; console_x; console_y; console_z;
    34→                 f1_0 / 4;      (* rad = F1_0/4 *)
    35→                 obj_id;        (* thisobjnum *)
    36→                 5;             (* FQ_TRANSWALL | FQ_CHECK_OBJS *)
    37→                 obj_segnum;    (* startseg *)
    38→                 0 |]           (* no ignore list *)
    39→  in
    40→  let result = fvi_find_vector_intersection query in
    41→  let hit_type = result.(0) in
    42→  let hit_object = result.(7) in
    43→  if hit_type = 0 (* HIT_NONE *)
    44→     || (hit_type = 2 (* HIT_OBJECT *) && hit_object = player_objnum)
    45→  then 2 else 0
    46→
    47→(* -- D1: do_controlcen_frame ------------------------------------------- *)
    48→
    49→let do_controlcen_frame_d1
    50→      ~cc_been_hit
    51→      ~cc_player_seen
    52→      ~cc_next_fire_time
    53→      ~n_guns
    54→      ~gun_pos_flat
    55→      ~gun_dir_flat
    56→      ~frame_count
    57→      ~frame_time
    58→      ~game_mode
    59→      ~difficulty_level
    60→      ~player_flags
    61→      ~player_is_dead
    62→      ~game_time
    63→      ~player_time_of_death
    64→      ~obj_x
    65→      ~obj_y
    66→      ~obj_z
    67→      ~obj_segnum
    68→      ~console_x
    69→      ~console_y
    70→      ~console_z
    71→      ~believed_x
    72→      ~believed_y
    73→      ~believed_z
    74→      ~has_children
    75→      ~obj_id
    76→      ~player_objnum
    77→  =
    78→  let player_flags_cloaked = 0x800 in
    79→  let cc_been_hit = ref cc_been_hit in
    80→  let cc_player_seen = ref cc_player_seen in
    81→  let cc_next_fire_time = ref cc_next_fire_time in
    82→  if not (!cc_been_hit <> 0 || !cc_player_seen <> 0)
    83→  then (
    84→    (* Detection phase: every 8 frames *)
    85→    if frame_count mod 8 = 0
    86→    then
    87→      if not (has_children <> 0)
    88→      then () (* isolated segment, bail *)
    89→      else (
    90→        let vtpx = console_x - obj_x in
    91→        let vtpy = console_y - obj_y in
    92→        let vtpz = console_z - obj_z in
    93→        let dist, (nx, ny, nz) =
    94→          Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(vtpx, vtpy, vtpz)
    95→        in
    96→        if dist < f1_0 * 200
    97→        then (
    98→          let vis =
    99→            check_player_visible ~obj_x ~obj_y ~obj_z ~obj_segnum ~console_x
   100→              ~console_y ~console_z ~obj_id ~player_objnum
   101→          in
   102→          cc_player_seen := vis;
   103→          cc_next_fire_time := 0));
   104→    [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time |])
   105→  else if
   106→    !cc_next_fire_time < 0
   107→    && not (player_is_dead <> 0 && game_time > player_time_of_death + (f1_0 * 2))
   108→  then (
   109→    (* Fire phase *)
   110→    let target_x, target_y, target_z =
   111→      if player_flags land player_flags_cloaked <> 0
   112→      then believed_x, believed_y, believed_z
   113→      else console_x, console_y, console_z
   114→    in
   115→    (* calc_best_gun inline via packed array *)
   116→    let packed_len = 1 + (6 * n_guns) + 3 in
   117→    let packed = Array.create ~len:packed_len 0 in
   118→    packed.(0) <- n_guns;
   119→    for i = 0 to n_guns - 1 do
   120→      packed.(1 + (3 * i)) <- gun_pos_flat.(3 * i);
   121→      packed.(1 + (3 * i) + 1) <- gun_pos_flat.((3 * i) + 1);
   122→      packed.(1 + (3 * i) + 2) <- gun_pos_flat.((3 * i) + 2)
   123→    done;
   124→    let dir_off = 1 + (3 * n_guns) in
   125→    for i = 0 to n_guns - 1 do
   126→      packed.(dir_off + (3 * i)) <- gun_dir_flat.(3 * i);
   127→      packed.(dir_off + (3 * i) + 1) <- gun_dir_flat.((3 * i) + 1);
   128→      packed.(dir_off + (3 * i) + 2) <- gun_dir_flat.((3 * i) + 2)
   129→    done;
   130→    let obj_off = 1 + (6 * n_guns) in
   131→    packed.(obj_off) <- target_x;
   132→    packed.(obj_off + 1) <- target_y;
   133→    packed.(obj_off + 2) <- target_z;
   134→    let best_gun_num = Ox_collide.calc_best_gun packed in
   135→    if best_gun_num <> -1
   136→    then (
   137→      let gun_px = gun_pos_flat.(3 * best_gun_num) in
   138→      let gun_py = gun_pos_flat.((3 * best_gun_num) + 1) in
   139→      let gun_pz = gun_pos_flat.((3 * best_gun_num) + 2) in

   159→        Effect.perform

   182→        let delta_fire_time = ref ((ndl - difficulty_level) * f1_0 / 4) in

   184→        cc_next_fire_time := !delta_fire_time;

file.content:
(* Pure game logic for control center frame AI.
   do_controlcen_frame: detects player, selects gun, fires lasers with spread. *)

let f1_0 = 0x10000
let ndl = 5

(* -- Algebraic effects for side effects -------------------------------- *)

type _ Effect.t +=
  | Fire_weapon : (int * int * int * int * int * int * int * int) -> unit Effect.t
  | Send_controlcen_fire : (int * int * int * int * int) -> unit Effect.t
  | P_Rand : int Effect.t

(* Fire_weapon args: dir_x, dir_y, dir_z, pos_x, pos_y, pos_z, parent_id, make_sound *)
(* Send_controlcen_fire args: dir_x, dir_y, dir_z, gun_num, obj_id *)
(* P_Rand returns: int *)

let make_random_vector () =
  let rx = (Effect.perform P_Rand - 16384) lor 1 in
  let ry = Effect.perform P_Rand - 16384 in
  let rz = Effect.perform P_Rand - 16384 in
  let _, v = Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(rx, ry, rz) in
  v

(* FVI external for inline visibility check — reuses physics sim C function *)
external fvi_find_vector_intersection : int array -> int array
  = "cd_ox_effect_ps_find_vector_intersection"

(* Inline visibility check using FVI ray cast.
   Returns 2 if player visible (hit nothing or hit the player object), 0 otherwise. *)
let check_player_visible ~obj_x ~obj_y ~obj_z ~obj_segnum ~console_x ~console_y
    ~console_z ~obj_id ~player_objnum =
  let query = [| obj_x; obj_y; obj_z; console_x; console_y; console_z;
                 f1_0 / 4;      (* rad = F1_0/4 *)
                 obj_id;        (* thisobjnum *)
                 5;             (* FQ_TRANSWALL | FQ_CHECK_OBJS *)
                 obj_segnum;    (* startseg *)
                 0 |]           (* no ignore list *)
  in
  let result = fvi_find_vector_intersection query in
  let hit_type = result.(0) in
  let hit_object = result.(7) in
  if hit_type = 0 (* HIT_NONE *)
     || (hit_type = 2 (* HIT_OBJECT *) && hit_object = player_objnum)
  then 2 else 0

(* -- D1: do_controlcen_frame ------------------------------------------- *)

let do_controlcen_frame_d1
      ~cc_been_hit
      ~cc_player_seen
      ~cc_next_fire_time
      ~n_guns
      ~gun_pos_flat
      ~gun_dir_flat
      ~frame_count
      ~frame_time
      ~game_mode
      ~difficulty_level
      ~player_flags
      ~player_is_dead
      ~game_time
      ~player_time_of_death
      ~obj_x
      ~obj_y
      ~obj_z
      ~obj_segnum
      ~console_x
      ~console_y
      ~console_z
      ~believed_x
      ~believed_y
      ~believed_z
      ~has_children
      ~obj_id
      ~player_objnum
  =
  let player_flags_cloaked = 0x800 in
  let cc_been_hit = ref cc_been_hit in
  let cc_player_seen = ref cc_player_seen in
  let cc_next_fire_time = ref cc_next_fire_time in
  if not (!cc_been_hit <> 0 || !cc_player_seen <> 0)
  then (
    (* Detection phase: every 8 frames *)
    if frame_count mod 8 = 0
    then
      if not (has_children <> 0)
      then () (* isolated segment, bail *)
      else (
        let vtpx = console_x - obj_x in
        let vtpy = console_y - obj_y in
        let vtpz = console_z - obj_z in
        let dist, (nx, ny, nz) =
          Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(vtpx, vtpy, vtpz)
        in
        if dist < f1_0 * 200
        then (
          let vis =
            check_player_visible ~obj_x ~obj_y ~obj_z ~obj_segnum ~console_x
              ~console_y ~console_z ~obj_id ~player_objnum
          in
          cc_player_seen := vis;
          cc_next_fire_time := 0));
    [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time |])
  else if
    !cc_next_fire_time < 0
    && not (player_is_dead <> 0 && game_time > player_time_of_death + (f1_0 * 2))
  then (
    (* Fire phase *)
    let target_x, target_y, target_z =
      if player_flags land player_flags_cloaked <> 0
      then believed_x, believed_y, believed_z
      else console_x, console_y, console_z
    in
    (* calc_best_gun inline via packed array *)
    let packed_len = 1 + (6 * n_guns) + 3 in
    let packed = Array.create ~len:packed_len 0 in
    packed.(0) <- n_guns;
    for i = 0 to n_guns - 1 do
      packed.(1 + (3 * i)) <- gun_pos_flat.(3 * i);
      packed.(1 + (3 * i) + 1) <- gun_pos_flat.((3 * i) + 1);
      packed.(1 + (3 * i) + 2) <- gun_pos_flat.((3 * i) + 2)
    done;
    let dir_off = 1 + (3 * n_guns) in
    for i = 0 to n_guns - 1 do
      packed.(dir_off + (3 * i)) <- gun_dir_flat.(3 * i);
      packed.(dir_off + (3 * i) + 1) <- gun_dir_flat.((3 * i) + 1);
      packed.(dir_off + (3 * i) + 2) <- gun_dir_flat.((3 * i) + 2)
    done;
    let obj_off = 1 + (6 * n_guns) in
    packed.(obj_off) <- target_x;
    packed.(obj_off + 1) <- target_y;
    packed.(obj_off + 2) <- target_z;
    let best_gun_num = Ox_collide.calc_best_gun packed in
    if best_gun_num <> -1
    then (
      let gun_px = gun_pos_flat.(3 * best_gun_num) in
      let gun_py = gun_pos_flat.((3 * best_gun_num) + 1) in
      let gun_pz = gun_pos_flat.((3 * best_gun_num) + 2) in
      let vtgx = target_x - gun_px in
      let vtgy = target_y - gun_py in
      let vtgz = target_z - gun_pz in
      let dist, (nx, ny, nz) =
        Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(vtgx, vtgy, vtgz)
      in
      if dist > f1_0 * 300
      then (
        cc_been_hit := 0;
        cc_player_seen := 0;
        [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time |])
      else (
        let vec_x = ref nx in
        let vec_y = ref ny in
        let vec_z = ref nz in
        if game_mode land 1 <> 0
        then
          Effect.perform
            (Send_controlcen_fire (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, best_gun_num, obj_id));
        Effect.perform
          (Fire_weapon (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, gun_px, gun_py, gun_pz, obj_id, 1));
        (* 1/4 of time, fire another spread shot *)
        let prand = Effect.perform P_Rand in
        if prand < 32767 / 4
        then (
          let rx, ry, rz = make_random_vector () in
          let sx, sy, sz =
            Ox_math.vm_vec_scale_add2
              ~dest:(!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z)
              ~src:(rx, ry, rz)
              ~k:(f1_0 / 4)
          in
          let _, (nx2, ny2, nz2) = Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(sx, sy, sz) in
          vec_x := nx2;
          vec_y := ny2;
          vec_z := nz2;
          if game_mode land 1 <> 0
          then
            Effect.perform
              (Send_controlcen_fire (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, best_gun_num, obj_id));
          Effect.perform
            (Fire_weapon (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, gun_px, gun_py, gun_pz, obj_id, 1)));
        let delta_fire_time = ref ((ndl - difficulty_level) * f1_0 / 4) in
        if game_mode land 1 <> 0 then delta_fire_time := !delta_fire_time * 2;
        cc_next_fire_time := !delta_fire_time;
        [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time |]))
    else [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time |])
  else (
    cc_next_fire_time := !cc_next_fire_time - frame_time;
    [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time |])
;;

(* -- D2: do_controlcen_frame ------------------------------------------- *)

let do_controlcen_frame_d2
      ~cc_been_hit
      ~cc_player_seen
      ~cc_next_fire_time
      ~n_guns
      ~gun_pos_flat
      ~gun_dir_flat
      ~frame_count
      ~frame_time
      ~game_mode
      ~difficulty_level
      ~player_flags
      ~player_is_dead
      ~game_time
      ~player_time_of_death
      ~obj_x
      ~obj_y
      ~obj_z
      ~obj_segnum
      ~console_x
      ~console_y
      ~console_z
      ~believed_x
      ~believed_y
      ~believed_z
      ~has_children
      ~obj_id
      ~player_objnum
      ~current_level_num
      ~last_time_cc_vis_check
  =
  let player_flags_cloaked = 0x800 in
  let cc_been_hit = ref cc_been_hit in
  let cc_player_seen = ref cc_player_seen in
  let cc_next_fire_time = ref cc_next_fire_time in
  let last_vis_check = ref last_time_cc_vis_check in
  if not (!cc_been_hit <> 0 || !cc_player_seen <> 0)
  then (
    (* Detection phase: every 8 frames *)
    if frame_count mod 8 = 0
    then
      if not (has_children <> 0)
      then () (* isolated segment, bail *)
      else (
        let vtpx = console_x - obj_x in
        let vtpy = console_y - obj_y in
        let vtpz = console_z - obj_z in
        let dist, (nx, ny, nz) =
          Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(vtpx, vtpy, vtpz)
        in
        if dist < f1_0 * 200
        then (
          let vis =
            check_player_visible ~obj_x ~obj_y ~obj_z ~obj_segnum ~console_x
              ~console_y ~console_z ~obj_id ~player_objnum
          in
          cc_player_seen := vis;
          cc_next_fire_time := 0));
    [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time; !last_vis_check |])
  else (
    (* D2: periodic visibility re-check every 5 seconds *)
    if !cc_been_hit <> 0 || !cc_player_seen <> 0
    then
      if !last_vis_check + (f1_0 * 5) < game_time || !last_vis_check > game_time
      then (
        let vtpx = console_x - obj_x in
        let vtpy = console_y - obj_y in
        let vtpz = console_z - obj_z in
        let dist, (nx, ny, nz) =
          Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(vtpx, vtpy, vtpz)
        in
        last_vis_check := game_time;
        if dist < f1_0 * 120
        then (
          let vis =
            check_player_visible ~obj_x ~obj_y ~obj_z ~obj_segnum ~console_x
              ~console_y ~console_z ~obj_id ~player_objnum
          in
          cc_player_seen := vis;
          if !cc_player_seen = 0 then cc_been_hit := 0));
    if
      !cc_next_fire_time < 0
      && not (player_is_dead <> 0 && game_time > player_time_of_death + (f1_0 * 2))
    then (
      (* Fire phase *)
      let target_x, target_y, target_z =
        if player_flags land player_flags_cloaked <> 0
        then believed_x, believed_y, believed_z
        else console_x, console_y, console_z
      in
      let packed_len = 1 + (6 * n_guns) + 3 in
      let packed = Array.create ~len:packed_len 0 in
      packed.(0) <- n_guns;
      for i = 0 to n_guns - 1 do
        packed.(1 + (3 * i)) <- gun_pos_flat.(3 * i);
        packed.(1 + (3 * i) + 1) <- gun_pos_flat.((3 * i) + 1);
        packed.(1 + (3 * i) + 2) <- gun_pos_flat.((3 * i) + 2)
      done;
      let dir_off = 1 + (3 * n_guns) in
      for i = 0 to n_guns - 1 do
        packed.(dir_off + (3 * i)) <- gun_dir_flat.(3 * i);
        packed.(dir_off + (3 * i) + 1) <- gun_dir_flat.((3 * i) + 1);
        packed.(dir_off + (3 * i) + 2) <- gun_dir_flat.((3 * i) + 2)
      done;
      let obj_off = 1 + (6 * n_guns) in
      packed.(obj_off) <- target_x;
      packed.(obj_off + 1) <- target_y;
      packed.(obj_off + 2) <- target_z;
      let best_gun_num = Ox_collide.calc_best_gun packed in
      if best_gun_num <> -1
      then (
        let gun_px = gun_pos_flat.(3 * best_gun_num) in
        let gun_py = gun_pos_flat.((3 * best_gun_num) + 1) in
        let gun_pz = gun_pos_flat.((3 * best_gun_num) + 2) in
        let vtgx = target_x - gun_px in
        let vtgy = target_y - gun_py in
        let vtgz = target_z - gun_pz in
        let dist, (nx, ny, nz) =
          Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(vtgx, vtgy, vtgz)
        in
        if dist > f1_0 * 300
        then (
          cc_been_hit := 0;
          cc_player_seen := 0;
          [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time; !last_vis_check |])
        else (
          let vec_x = ref nx in
          let vec_y = ref ny in
          let vec_z = ref nz in
          if game_mode land 1 <> 0
          then
            Effect.perform
              (Send_controlcen_fire (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, best_gun_num, obj_id));
          Effect.perform
            (Fire_weapon (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, gun_px, gun_py, gun_pz, obj_id, 1));
          (* D2: fire multiple spread shots based on level *)
          let rand_prob = f1_0 / ((abs current_level_num / 4) + 2) in
          let count = ref 0 in
          let keep_firing = ref true in
          while !keep_firing && !count < 4 do
            let prand = Effect.perform P_Rand in
            if prand > rand_prob
            then (
              let rx, ry, rz = make_random_vector () in
              let sx, sy, sz =
                Ox_math.vm_vec_scale_add2
                  ~dest:(!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z)
                  ~src:(rx, ry, rz)
                  ~k:(f1_0 / 6)
              in
              let _, (nx2, ny2, nz2) =
                Ox_math.vm_vec_copy_normalize_quick ~v:(sx, sy, sz)
              in
              vec_x := nx2;
              vec_y := ny2;
              vec_z := nz2;
              if game_mode land 1 <> 0
              then
                Effect.perform
                  (Send_controlcen_fire (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, best_gun_num, obj_id));
              Effect.perform
                (Fire_weapon (!vec_x, !vec_y, !vec_z, gun_px, gun_py, gun_pz, obj_id, 0));
              count := !count + 1)
            else keep_firing := false
          done;
          let delta_fire_time = ref ((ndl - difficulty_level) * f1_0 / 4) in
          if difficulty_level = 0 then delta_fire_time := !delta_fire_time + (f1_0 / 2);
          if game_mode land 1 <> 0 then delta_fire_time := !delta_fire_time * 2;
          cc_next_fire_time := !delta_fire_time;
          [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time; !last_vis_check |]))
      else [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time; !last_vis_check |])
    else (
      cc_next_fire_time := !cc_next_fire_time - frame_time;
      [| !cc_been_hit; !cc_player_seen; !cc_next_fire_time; !last_vis_check |]))
;;

file.content:
(* ox_obj.ml — Object management functions ported from object.cpp *)

open Core

(* -- Algebraic effects -------------------------------------------------- *)

type _ Effect.t +=
  | Obj_detach_one_internal : int -> unit Effect.t
  | Get_attached_obj_internal : int -> int Effect.t
  | Get_seg_first_object_internal : int -> int Effect.t
  | Get_obj_next_internal : int -> int Effect.t
  | Get_highest_segment_index_internal : int Effect.t

let obj_detach_one objnum = Effect.perform (Obj_detach_one_internal objnum)
let get_attached_obj objnum = Effect.perform (Get_attached_obj_internal objnum)
let get_seg_first_object segnum = Effect.perform (Get_seg_first_object_internal segnum)
let get_obj_next objnum = Effect.perform (Get_obj_next_internal objnum)
let get_highest_segment_index () = Effect.perform Get_highest_segment_index_internal

let max_objects = 350

(* -- Ported functions --------------------------------------------------- *)

(* Count occurrences of object objn in segment segnum's object linked list.
   C original: int is_object_in_seg(int segnum, int objn)
   Debug-only function (#ifndef NDEBUG). *)
let is_object_in_seg ~segnum ~objn =
  let count = ref 0 in
  let objnum = ref (get_seg_first_object segnum) in
  let done_ = ref false in

file.content:
;;

(* Compute turning rate for rotational whack and apply turn.
   C original: physics.cpp phys_apply_rot (D1 version)

   Inputs:
     force_vec - whack direction (vec3)
     mass      - object mass
     is_robot  - true if obj->type == OBJ_ROBOT
     fvec      - object's forward vector (vec3)
     is_morph  - true if control_type == CT_MORPH
     cur_rotvel - current rotational velocity (vec3)

   Returns: (new_rotvel, set_skip_ai) where set_skip_ai indicates
   that SKIP_AI_COUNT should be set to 2 on the C side. *)
let phys_apply_rot ~force_vec ~mass ~is_robot ~fvec ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel =
  let vecmag = Ox_math.vm_vec_mag ~v:force_vec / 8 in
  if vecmag < f1_0 / 256
  then (
    let rate = 4 * f1_0 in
    let new_rv =
      physics_turn_towards_vector ~goal:force_vec ~fvec ~rate ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
    in
    new_rv, false)
  else if vecmag < mass asr 14
  then (
    let rate = 4 * f1_0 in
    let new_rv =
      physics_turn_towards_vector ~goal:force_vec ~fvec ~rate ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
    in
    new_rv, false)
  else (
    let rate = Ox_math.fixdiv ~a:mass ~b:vecmag in
    let rate = if is_robot then max rate (f1_0 / 4) else max rate (f1_0 / 2) in
    let new_rv =
      physics_turn_towards_vector ~goal:force_vec ~fvec ~rate ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
    in
    new_rv, is_robot)
;;

(* AI turn towards vector — smooth orientation interpolation.
   C original: ai.cpp ai_turn_towards_vector (non-baby-spider path)

   Inputs:
     goal       - target direction vector (vec3)
     fvec       - object's current forward vector (vec3)
     rvec       - object's current right vector (vec3)
     rate       - turning rate (higher = slower turn)
     frame_time - FrameTime global
     seismic_mag - Seismic_tremor_magnitude (D2 only, 0 for D1)
     robot_mass  - Robot_info[id].mass (D2 only, 0 for D1)
     rand_vec    - pre-generated random vector for seismic (D2 only, (0,0,0) for D1)

   Returns: new orientation matrix (rvec, uvec, fvec) as 9 fix values.
   Baby spider check is handled at the C callsite, not here. *)
let ai_turn_towards_vector
      ~goal
      ~fvec
      ~rvec
      ~rate

(* D2 version of phys_apply_rot — differs from D1 in SKIP_AI_COUNT handling.
   D2 probabilistically increments SKIP_AI_COUNT based on FrameTime,
   unless robot is thief or attack_type.

   Extra inputs vs D1:
     is_thief      - Robot_info[id].thief
     is_attack_type - Robot_info[id].attack_type
     skip_ai_count - current SKIP_AI_COUNT
     frame_time    - FrameTime
     p_rand        - pre-rolled P_Rand() value

   Returns: (new_rotvel, skip_ai_addval) where skip_ai_addval is amount
   to add to SKIP_AI_COUNT on the C side. *)
let phys_apply_rot_d2 ~force_vec ~mass ~is_robot ~fvec ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
    ~is_thief ~is_attack_type ~skip_ai_count ~frame_time ~p_rand =
  let vecmag = Ox_math.vm_vec_mag ~v:force_vec / 8 in
  if vecmag < f1_0 / 256
  then (
    let rate = 4 * f1_0 in
    let new_rv =
      physics_turn_towards_vector ~goal:force_vec ~fvec ~rate ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
    in
    new_rv, 0)
  else if vecmag < mass asr 14
  then (
    let rate = 4 * f1_0 in
    let new_rv =
      physics_turn_towards_vector ~goal:force_vec ~fvec ~rate ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
    in
    new_rv, 0)
  else (
    let rate = Ox_math.fixdiv ~a:mass ~b:vecmag in
    if is_robot
    then (
      let rate = max rate (f1_0 / 4) in
      let skip_ai_addval =
        if (not is_thief) && (not is_attack_type)
        then
          if skip_ai_count * frame_time < 3 * f1_0 / 4
          then (
            let tval = Ox_math.fixdiv ~a:f1_0 ~b:(8 * frame_time) in
            let addval = tval asr 16 in
            if p_rand * 2 < (tval land 0xffff) then addval + 1 else addval)
          else 0
        else 0
      in
      let new_rv =
        physics_turn_towards_vector ~goal:force_vec ~fvec ~rate ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
      in
      new_rv, skip_ai_addval)
    else (
      let rate = max rate (f1_0 / 2) in
      let new_rv =
        physics_turn_towards_vector ~goal:force_vec ~fvec ~rate ~is_morph ~cur_rotvel
      in
      new_rv, 0))
;;
